name: fim_delta_directory_changes
description: ModuleDelta (mode=1) — simulates incremental FIM changes after initial scan. Small data_size represents a few modified/created/deleted files per cycle.
notes: sync_mode=1: no deleteByQuery, only upsert/delete operations applied incrementally.
Low data_size simulates typical real-world delta: a few files changed between scans.
Frequent short sessions to stress session cycling.
